plugins.name: billing-skills
plugins.description: 22 standalone skills for Zoho Billing — MRR/ARR/NRR analytics, AR collections, invoice investigation, churn analysis, trial monitoring, payment failure diagnosis, and more.

plugins.name: analyst-agent
plugins.description: Full-spectrum business analyst for Zoho Billing. Runs three parallel analysis tracks — Sales Performance, Collection Performance, and Subscription Growth — then synthesises them into a single business-health scorecard. Read-only; produces Markdown reports for human review.

plugins.name: dunning-agent
plugins.description: Proactively prevent involuntary churn by analysing subscriptions currently in dunning, grouping them by gateway error code, scoring each by revenue at risk, LTV, lifetime duration, and retry count, and producing a prioritised action report with error-code-specific remediation playbooks for human review.

plugins.name: payment-intelligence-agent
plugins.description: Predict and prevent involuntary churn by identifying payment failures early and recommending proactive interventions. Customised with a decision matrix for your company's recovery strategies.

plugins.name: quote-agent
plugins.description: Accelerate quote closure by analysing open quotes, ranking by staleness and close value, and recommending next moves — follow-up, discount, convert, or mark lost.

plugins.name: recovery-agent
plugins.description: Signup recovery workflow for Zoho Billing. Fetches the last 7 days of lost opportunities and abandoned carts, ranks them by lost value, applies a tunable decision matrix, and produces a propose-only Markdown recovery action report for human review.

plugins.name: retention-agent
plugins.description: Pre-churn and win-back retention workflow for Zoho Billing. Detects at-risk subscriptions, classifies cancel reasons, applies a tunable decision matrix (LTV × LTD × reason), and produces a propose-only Markdown recommendation report for human review.
